SafeMoon v2 (BSC) to Solana Bridge

Burn your SafeMoon v2 tokens on BSC and receive 1:1 on Solana

To swap SafeMoon (SFM) v2 tokens from Binance Smart Chain (BSC) to Solana using this interface, start by connecting your wallet that holds the SFM v2 tokens. Once connected, your SafeMoon balance will be displayed. Enter the amount of SFM v2 tokens you wish to burn in the provided field, ensuring it does not exceed the available daily limit. Next, input your Solana wallet address where you want to receive the bridged tokens. After verifying the details, click the "Burn Tokens" button to initiate the process. The swap is executed at a 1:1 ratio for v2 tokens.

Connect Wallet

Connect your wallet to start bridging SafeMoon tokens
